message:
fix: simplify page transitions and add header clearance to Spec Evolution Lab

ClientShell (page transition animation):
- Switch AnimatePresence to mode="wait" so exiting and entering pages
  don't overlap, preventing layout flash during route changes
- Remove y-axis translation (y: 10 / y: -10) from enter/exit, keeping
  opacity-only transitions which feel smoother and are inherently
  reduced-motion friendly without needing prefersReducedMotion branches
- Simplify easing from cubic-bezier([0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1.0]) to
  the named "easeOut" preset for readability

Spec Evolution Lab:
- Add pt-20 (5rem top padding) to the <main> container so content
  starts below the fixed site header instead of rendering underneath it

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
